title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 64.295 - Violations of law or regulation, misdemeanor — civil remedies (noncharter first class counties)
text:
64.295.  Violations of law or regulation, misdemeanor — civil remedies (noncharter first class counties). — A violation of the provisions of sections 64.211 to 64.295, or of any order or regulation adopted under authority of sections 64.211 to 64.295, is a misdemeanor.  The proper county authorities or any persons, the value or use of whose property is or may be affected by such violation in addition to other remedies, may also institute any appropriate action or proceedings by preventing or removing such violation.
(L. 1959 S.B. 309 § 17)
